profiles.name: Waka Flocka Flame
profiles.biography: Juaquin James Malphurs, known professionally as Waka Flocka Flame, is an American rapper. He became a mainstream artist with the release of his singles 'O Let's Do It', 'Hard in da Paint', and 'No Hands'.

companies.name: ASCAP
companies.description: American Society of Composers, Authors and Publishers

opportunities.title: Sync Placement Opportunity
opportunities.description: Seeking placements for film/TV for Waka Flocka catalog
